understanding.goal_understanding: Reach the goal gem tile marked `+` in each level to win, then progress through levels until the entire game is won.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement uses `MOVE_LEFT`/`MOVE_RIGHT` with automatic gravity fall until landing. Spikes (`u`/`v`) kill instantly. `CLICK` removes breakable blocks (`x`). Each level allows two 50-turn attempts; failure restarts the level. `UNDO` reverts one action.

Agent explained goal and mechanics.

understanding.goal_understanding: Reach the goal gem tile marked `+` in each level to win, then progress through levels until the entire game is won.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement uses `MOVE_LEFT`/`MOVE_RIGHT` with automatic gravity fall until landing. Spikes (`u`/`v`) kill instantly. `CLICK` removes breakable blocks (`x`). Each level allows two 50-turn attempts; failure restarts the level. `UNDO` reverts one action.
